allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('@auth/prisma-adapter/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', d.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(d.peerDependencies, null, 2\)\)")
